name: Lattice Cherry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Refrigerate the cookie mix dough from the dairy case.
2. Freeze the cookie dough for 1 hour. Slice into 1/8-inch slices.
3. Arrange the slices, slightly overlapping, on the bottom and sides of a greased 9-inch springform pan to form the crust. Seal the edges with floured fingers.
4. Combine cream cheese, sour cream, sugar, and extract in a bowl. Mix until well blended.
5. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Reserve 1/4 cup of batter.
6. Pour the remaining batter over the crust. Bake at 350 degrees F for 1 hour and 10 minutes.
7. Increase oven temperature to 450 degrees F. Spoon pie filling over the cheesecake. Spoon the reserved batter over the pie filling, forming a lattice design.
8. Bake at 450 degrees F for 10 minutes. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan before removing it.
